name: messages.send
description: Send a message to a conversation. Supports text, status_card, blocker_card, progress_card, code_block, run_summary, and system message types. Optionally thread under a parent message.

conversation_id.description: Conversation ID to send the message to (required)

parent_id.description: Optional parent message ID for threading

structured_payload.description: Optional structured data payload (e.g., code block metadata)

run_id.description: Optional run ID to link the message to an execution run

behavior_id.description: Optional behavior ID to link the message to a behavior

work_item_id.description: Optional work item ID to link the message to a work item

org_id.description: Optional organization ID for multi-tenant context
